title: coryphopteris tanggamensis
intro: Coryphopteris tanggamensis, also known as Tanggamus fern, is a species of fern native to Sumatra, Indonesia. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coryphopteris tanggamensis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are applied directly to the affected area to promote healing and relaxation.
